# Astravedam

> AI-powered Vedic astrology platform — chat with Hindu deities, get personalized Kundali readings, daily horoscopes, Panchang, Muhurat, Sade Sati analysis and sacred remedies. Rooted in authentic Jyotish tradition, powered by modern AI.

## What Astravedam Does

Astravedam combines ancient Vedic wisdom with artificial intelligence to provide personalized spiritual guidance. Users can have real conversations with AI representations of Hindu deities, get detailed birth chart readings, check daily horoscopes for all 12 Moon signs, find auspicious timing for important events, and receive personalized remedies for life challenges.

## Features

- **Deity Chat** — Conversational AI with Lord Krishna (free, 50 messages), Lord Shiva, Goddess Lakshmi, Lord Hanuman, Goddess Saraswati, Lord Ganesha. Responses are drawn from authentic Vedic scriptures and personalized to the user's questions.
- **Kundali Reading** — Personalized Vedic birth chart (Janam Kundali) based on name, date of birth, time of birth and place of birth. ₹14 one-time.
- **Aaj Ka Rashifal** — Daily horoscope for all 12 Moon signs (Mesh, Vrishabh, Mithun, Kark, Simha, Kanya, Tula, Vrishchik, Dhanu, Makar, Kumbh, Meen). Free, no login required.
- **Panchang** — Daily Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Rahukala and Muhurat calculated for the user's location.
- **Divya Upay** — Personalized Vedic remedies including mantras, rituals, charitable acts and spiritual practices. ₹19 one-time.
- **Kundali Milan** — Ashtakoot compatibility analysis for marriage matching, 36-point Guna Milan scoring. ₹49 one-time.
- **Muhurat Finder** — Auspicious timing for marriage, business launch, travel, housewarming and other important events. ₹9 one-time.
- **Sade Sati Report** — Analysis of Saturn's 7.5-year transit (Sade Sati) and its specific impact on the user's Moon sign. ₹49 one-time.
- **Varshphal** — Annual Solar Return chart reading with predictions month by month for career, finance, health and relationships. ₹49 one-time.
- **Festival Calendar** — Hindu festivals, fasting days and Ekadashis for 2026 with dates and significance.
- **Vedic Wisdom Blog** — Articles on Panchang, Navagraha, Sade Sati, Vastu, and Vedic philosophy.

## Pricing

All features are low-cost, one-time payments with no subscription required:
- Deity Chat with Krishna: Free (50 messages)
- Deity Chat with other deities: ₹99 per deity (50 messages, 30 days)
- Kundali Reading: ₹14
- Divya Upay: ₹19
- Kundali Milan: ₹49
- Muhurat Finder: ₹9
- Sade Sati Report: ₹49
- Varshphal: ₹49

## Technical Details

- Web application built with React
- Backend powered by OpenAI GPT models with Vedic astrology context
- Payments via Razorpay (Indian payment gateway)
- Authentication via Google Sign-In (Firebase)
- Hosted on Vercel

## Target Audience

Indians and people of Indian origin seeking Vedic astrology guidance, spiritual advice, and authentic connections with Hindu tradition through modern AI technology. Available in English and Hindi.

## URL

https://astravedam.com
